## ₿ Bitcoin

**Current Price: ~$67,468** ▼ -6.0% — *Slipped below $70K for first time since April*

```
Fear & Greed Index ──────────────────────────────────────────
  0        25        50        75        100
  |═════════|         |         |         |
  Extreme   FEAR      Neutral   Greed     Extreme
  Fear      ▲ 29                          Greed
             TODAY (↓ from 31 yesterday)
```

| Metric | Value | Trend |
|--------|-------|-------|
| BTC Price | ~$67,468 | ▼ -6% |
| Fear & Greed | 29 — **Fear** | ▼ Worsening |
| Crypto Market Cap | $2.39T | ▼ -$110B (24h) |
| Spot ETF Flows | Outflows | 🔴 11 consecutive days / ~$3B out |
| Strategy BTC Holdings | 843,706 BTC | Stable (small 32 BTC sale) |

**Key News:**
- 🔴 BTC crashed through $70K support — lowest level since April, down ~6%
- 🏦 U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs: 11 straight days of outflows totalling ~$3 billion (*Yahoo Finance*)
- 🏢 Strategy (MSTR) sold 32 BTC for $2.5M — first Bitcoin sale since December 2022, adding market unease (*GuruFocus*)
- 📉 Macro headwinds: sticky inflation, renewed USD strength, reduced Fed rate-cut expectations
- 🤖 AI sector absorbing capital that might otherwise flow to crypto

---

## 🤖 Tech & AI

- **🚀 Anthropic Files for IPO** — Anthropic confidentially filed with the SEC on June 1 for a public offering, at a **$965B valuation** and **$47B in annualised revenue**. Leaps ahead of OpenAI in the IPO race. *(Washington Post, CBS News, NPR)*
- **🧠 Claude Opus 4.8 Launched** — Anthropic released Claude Opus 4.8 featuring parallel multiagent "dreaming" for massive codebase migrations, plus new **Dynamic Workflows** orchestration. A new "Mythos" model with even higher intelligence is arriving soon. *(Fortune)*
- **⚠️ Claude Outage** — Claude AI suffered a major capacity-constraint outage on June 2, affecting multiple services globally. *(The National)*
- **🔍 Google I/O 2026** — Google unveiled **Gemini 3.5 Flash** (flagship-level intelligence at Flash speeds), Gemini Omni Flash rolling out to all subscribers, and a new **$100/mo AI Ultra plan** for developers with 5× higher usage limits. *(Google Blog)*
- **☁️ OpenAI on AWS** — OpenAI's frontier models and Codex are now generally available on Amazon Bedrock, giving enterprises AWS-native security, governance, and compliance. *(Releasebot)*

---

## 🧬 Health & Science

- **🦴 RA Prevention Breakthrough** — Just one year of abatacept (immune-targeting drug) can delay the onset of rheumatoid arthritis in high-risk individuals — suggesting it may not be inevitable. *(ScienceDaily)*
- **🫀 Thymus & Aging** — Mass General Brigham used AI to analyse CT scans from tens of thousands of adults, finding thymus health is a surprising predictor of cancer survival and healthy ageing. *(Mass General Brigham)*
- **🧬 Gene Therapy Advances** — CRISPR and personalised gene therapy continue to accelerate following 2025's milestone: the first fully customised CRISPR treatment delivered to a baby. *(Live Science)*
- **🤖 ARPA-H AI Health** — ARPA-H begins selecting innovation teams this month to develop AI-driven medical technologies, with competitive down-selection after year one. *(crescendo.ai)*

---

| Index | Move | Note |
|-------|------|------|
| 🟠 S&P 500 | ▼ -0.14% | Day after fresh record close |
| 🔵 Dow Jones | ▼ -0.09% | Slight retreat |
| 🟣 Nasdaq | ▼ -0.25% | Tech-led dip |
| 🟡 Russell 2000 | ▼ -0.47% | Small caps underperform |

**Key Drivers:**
- 📈 All three major indexes hit **record highs** on June 1 — tech and energy led
- 💻 **HPE surged** after beating Q2 earnings and raising full-year guidance
- 🌍 Uncertainty over **U.S.-Iran tensions** weighing on sentiment (TheStreet)
- 💵 Strong U.S. dollar and sticky inflation keeping Fed rate-cut hopes subdued
- ₿ Crypto sell-off ($110B wiped in 24h) with capital rotating into equities and AI

*Brief generated June 2, 2026 · Sources: Yahoo Finance, CNBC, MarketBeat, GuruFocus, Fortune, Washington Post, CBS News, NPR, ScienceDaily, Mass General Brigham, Live Science, TheStreet, 24/7 Wall St.*
